description: SpectroCoin is a cryptocurrency platform that offers wallet, exchange, payout, and merchant payment services. It provides tools for businesses and developers to integrate crypto payments and related account operations into their applications.
summary: SpectroCoin exposes two public HTTP API surfaces for developers: a current public API at `https://spectrocoin.com/api` documented in its Developer Hub, and a legacy Merchant API with an OpenAPI spec mirrored by APIs.guru; both require SpectroCoin-issued credentials.
